characters.name: Aidou
characters.description: AidouPersonal InformationFull NameAidou KouBiographical InformationAge21≈ (Fushigi Yuugi Volume 14)StatusAlivePhysical InformationGenderFemaleAffiliationKnown RelativesEimin Kou(Older Sister)Fuyou Kou (Older Sister)Rin'an Kou (Older Sister)Manka Kou (Older Sister)Tasuki(Younger Brother)Unnamed FatherUnnamed MotherCountryKonanCity/VillageTaito, Koshu Taito Province, West ofSouunBeast God/OtherSuzakuDebutChapterFushigi Yuugi Volume 14 - Chapter 2Aidou Kou(Ai-Tong), isTasuki'solder sister, and the youngest of the five daughters of theKou family. She appears inFushigi Yuugi: The Mysterious Playmangaand Tasuki'sone-shot,The Reason I Started Hating Women. Upon her entrance, Aidou’s character is shown as hardworking, sarcastic, and stern where she needs to be. Growing up with a passive father figure left more than a few marks on the Kou family, leaving Aidou and her siblings to work hard for their livelihoods, and their mother to take on a more dominant role in the household. Being surrounded by girls with no proper figure to lead Tasuki through his teenage years forced him to find guidance elsewhere. But not for Aidou, who seems to be empowered by the strong women in her life. Upon her entrance, Aidou’s character is shown as hardworking, sarcastic, and stern where she needs to be. Growing up with a passive father figure left more than a few marks on the Kou family, leaving Aidou and her siblings to work hard for their livelihoods, and their mother to take on a more dominant role in the household. Being surrounded by girls with no proper figure to lead Tasuki through his teenage years forced him to find guidance elsewhere. But not for Aidou, who seems to be empowered by the strong women in her life. While it remains unclear where the rest of the sisters ended up after leaving home, Aidou proves her devotion to her family by staying behind and helping her parents in their later years. She holds a deep sense of gratitude toward those who help her and her family. When she meetsMiakaandTaka, she continuously thanks them for providing support and adding purpose to her little brother’s life.[1] Like most siblings, she knows her brother well and can tell when he’s feeling off. She frequently speaks her mind, much to her brother's dismay.

characters.name: Amiboshi
characters.description: Amiboshi  Steve Staley(English) Amiboshi has lime-green hair which is pointed below, but atop his hair is unshapely streaked. He usually wears a blue turban and has black-almost to grey eyes. He has fair skin color. In the manga, his hair is light yellow. In the manga, when he was pretending to be Chiriko, you can see him in Chapters 25-37. He then falls into the river and at the same time Suboshi, his twin brother, thinks that the Suzaku warriors had killed him because he couldn't feel him anymore and went off to murder Tamahome's father and his siblings. (in Chapter 39)

characters.name: Anzu
characters.description: AnzuPersonal InformationFull NameAnzu (杏子, アンズ)Name MeaningApricotNicknames"Brat" -Kouji“Little Sister” -KarinBiographical InformationAge15StatusAliveOccupationAcrobat in Traveling CircusBandit (former)Physical InformationGenderFemaleHair ColorBlackAffiliationKnown RelativesUnnamed parents (abandoned)Karin(older sister)Group(s)Traveling Circus TroupeMt. Reikaku BanditsCelestial Warriors of SuzakuBeast God/OtherSuzakuAdditional InformationRankEntertainer/BanditWeaponMartial ArtsGenbu'sShinzaho(former)Tessen(former)AbilitiesAcrobaticsMartial ArtsDebutChapterSanbou Den Chapter 2Anzu(アンズ; 杏子, Xìngzi) is a major character inSanbou Den. She isKarin’syounger sister and befriendsTasukiandChichirion their journeys throughout thelight novel. “Little Sister” -Karin Experiencing abandonment at a young age made Anzu resent her parents. Where Karin remained optimistic, Anzu realized that returning to their home was not an option but continued to support her older sister. Life in the circus was stifling and deepened her desire to live for herself. Experiencing abandonment at a young age made Anzu resent her parents. Where Karin remained optimistic, Anzu realized that returning to their home was not an option but continued to support her older sister. Life in the circus was stifling and deepened her desire to live for herself. When she finally got her freedom, she is first shown to be fiery, stubborn, and controlling-- quite literally making others do her bidding. But her actions seemed to stem from the lack of control she had over her life until that point. She saw the Reikaku bandits as an opportunity to find her place, a home.

characters.name: Ashitare
characters.description: Ashitare  Ashitare(尾宿[1]) is one of theSeiryuu Celestial Warriors. He is half-man half-wolf. The constellation he was born under is "Tail." Despite his animalistic appearance, he has a concept of what is going on around him. His master,Nakago, has conditioned him to understand that failure will mean torture or worse. Fear, retribution, and rage drive most of his actions, as he was mocked and feared all of his life because of his physical features. In the three-part omake which isTale of the Forbidden Hot Spring Resort,Ashitare has more happy and comical side as opposed to his main personality for being animalistic. His wolf howls are mostly annoyed by Nakago, leading him to ask Soi to use her lightning powers to shut him up. Then making a crack joke about himself that he looks like a girl when he was little causing both Hotohori and Nakago to beat him down comically. Born in a penal colony in Northern Hokkan, Ashitare grew up as the prisoner of a freak show until he managed to escape. After a fleeting encounter withNurikoinYukigase, he is recaptured by his freak show master. Nakago who recognized him as one of the Seiryuu Seven and ended up freeing him. Indebted to him, Ashitare loyally and fearfully follows Nakago's every command. None of the other Seiryuu Warriors seem to consider Ashitare anything more than a beast, except forSoi, who shows him a modicum of sympathy and questions Nakago on the fact that he was sent into battle as a sacrifice. After he kills Nuriko onMt. Kokureishin, his human form dies from his injuries, but his powers allow him to fully transform into a wolf and he returns to Nakago. Feeling that he has outlived his service, Nakago kills him and leaves his body inHokkan.

characters.name: Ayla Chen
characters.description: Ayla ChenBiographical InformationBirthplaceKan TribeAffiliationKnown RelativesHikitsu(brother)✝CountryHokkanBeast God/OtherGenbu Ayla Chenチェン アイラ(Aira Chen), also known asAiraandAila, isHikitsu's younger sister who appears in the prequel seriesFushigi Yuugi Genbu Kaiden. She is voiced by Sayuri Yahagi in Japanese. She positively idolizes her brother, probably because he dotes on her so much. In trying to warn her brother of a monster once, she was accidently frozen into a big chunk of ice by Tomite along with said monsters. Her beloved big brother watched over her frozen, but not dead body for an entire year before Tomite returned and was able to defrost her. Even being accidently incased in a block of ice byTomite, Ayla still loves Tomite and later confesses her love, and agrees to stay with Tomite's mother. Her thoughts about Tomite seems to be kind and good because maybe she does not remember the incident. She bears a striking resemblance to Takiko. Even being accidently incased in a block of ice byTomite, Ayla still loves Tomite and later confesses her love, and agrees to stay with Tomite's mother. Her thoughts about Tomite seems to be kind and good because maybe she does not remember the incident. She bears a striking resemblance to Takiko. Ayla is rather quiet and gentle, having no trouble expressing her feelings. When she was younger, she is always seen close to her brother,Hikitsu, especially during dangers and emergencies or even sudden wars and battles. Ayla can be seen capable of managing a calm face in any situation if her older brother was beside her or near her. Ayla is timid and shy and much more to the 'girly' side. Her character was emphasized when she asked Tomite for a dance, which seemed to be messed-up and only half-audible, but in the end,Tomiteagrees.

characters.name: Bihou Kyou
characters.description: Bihou Kyouis a supporting character inTamahome'slight novelShugyoku Den. She is a wealthy girl who lives inKonan'scapital city ofEiyouwith her father Senmei Kyou. Upon her first appearance, Bihou is shown to be rude, materialistic, and judgmental. She looks down on the lower class and holds herself in high esteem regarding her beauty and wealth. Apart from being spoiled by her father, Senmei Kyou, she exhibits a moment of kindness in the light novel. Instead of throwing the lower classFukaout of her home, she dresses her up in finer clothes, claiming she would attract more men that way.

characters.name: Bogyoku
characters.description: BogyokuisHotohori's andShu Tendo's half-brother. Along withOugi,Kotsuki, and his motherMotaiko, he is another character to be only unveiled in the light novelSuzaku Hi Den. His story is not much told; the Emperor only recalls his death from a horseback accident.

characters.name: Borate Tan
characters.description:
Borate TanBiographical InformationBirthplaceHa TribeStatusAlivePhysical InformationGenderFemaleAffiliationKnown RelativesTomite(son)✝Unnamed Husband✝CountryHokkanBeast God/OtherGenbu Borate Tan(Bouraate Tan)isTomite's mother. She is a member of theHa TribeinHokkanand is one of the few people who still believe in the Legend ofGenbuat the time ofFushigi Yuugi: Genbu Kaiden. Borate is a portly, middle aged woman who sincerely believes inTakikoand her son's divinity. She believes that they will be the ones to end the poverty and conflicts that plague Hokkan.
She has dealt with a lot of hardship in her life, not limited to her husbands violent death. Such circumstances have left their scars, but she continuously shows her kind heartedness and bravery. Borate commands respect and is a genuinely a tough woman. She keeps her son in line, watches over many other people in the Ha Tribe, and radiates a motherly authority. characters.name: Boushin
characters.description: BoushinPersonal InformationFull NameBoushin (芒辰)NicknamesReizeitei (礼清帝) (imperial name)Biographical InformationBirthplaceKonan Imperial Palace,Eiyou,KonanStatusAliveOccupationCrown Prince of KonanPhysical InformationGenderMaleEye ColorBrownHair ColorBlackAffiliationKnown RelativesHotohori(father)You Houki(mother)Shu Tendo(uncle)✝Motaiko(grandmother)✝Kougantei (grandfather)✝Ougi(half-uncle)Bogyoku(half-uncle)✝Kotsuki(half-uncle)✝CountryKonanCity/VillageEiyouBeast God/OtherSuzakuAdditional InformationRankCrown Prince Boushin(芒辰), later known by the imperial nameReizeitei(礼清帝), isHotohoriandHouki'sson and nephew ofShu Tendo. He is the future emperor of theKonan Empire. In Japanese, he is voiced by Akiko Yajima. In English, he was voiced by Brianne Siddall and Bryce Papenbrook. As a child, Boushin is quiet and intelligent. As future emperor, he is determined to emulate both his father and mother on the throne after learning Hotohori's competent rule and witnessing his mother govern the empire during her regency. Watching Houki's braveness and boldness from infancy influenced Boushin to behave similarly during his own rule, however, as a young ruler, he is shown to cower and stammer at times due to his insecurities. Like his father, Boushin becomes fascinated by the legend of theSuzaku Warriorsand thePriestess. Raised on stories of the accomplishments, battles, and resiliency of Hotohori and his friends, Boushin develops a kind of reverence toward those he sees as living legends and extensions of his father.

characters.name: Byakuren
characters.description: ByakurenPersonal InformationFull NameByakuren (白蓮)Biographical InformationBirthplaceEiyou,KonanAge14 (Yukiyasha Den)StatusDeceasedPhysical InformationGenderFemaleHair ColorBrownAffiliationKnown RelativesTenbun(brother)Unnamed MotherCity/VillageYukigaseGroup(s)Yukigase Village CouncilImperial HaremAdditional InformationRankVillagerDebutChapterYukiyasha Den - Chapter 2Byakuren(白蓮, Bái Lián) is a major character inYukiyasha Den. She is considered one of the prettiest girls in her village,Yukigase, and has a deep attachment to her older brother,Tenbun, and her sickly mother. Throughout the beginning of the novel, Byakuren is portrayed as a hot-headed, vain, and selfish young girl. Her bond with her brother, Tenbun, is very close, as she relies on him as a support system. When she questions her appearance, she often pesters her brother to reassure her. But whenNurikoarrives in Yukigase, Byakuren grows increasingly jealous as she competes for Tenbun's attention and a spot in the imperial harem. Part of her behavior stems from a near-death experience as a child inEiyou. She recalls the youngEmperor Cai Pisaving her from an out-of-control horse after she chased after a violet ball. Since that day, she holds a strong conviction that, by securing a spot in the harem, she will see the Emperor again and thank him for saving her life. Throughout the beginning of the novel, Byakuren is portrayed as a hot-headed, vain, and selfish young girl. Her bond with her brother, Tenbun, is very close, as she relies on him as a support system. When she questions her appearance, she often pesters her brother to reassure her. But whenNurikoarrives in Yukigase, Byakuren grows increasingly jealous as she competes for Tenbun's attention and a spot in the imperial harem. Part of her behavior stems from a near-death experience as a child inEiyou. She recalls the youngEmperor Cai Pisaving her from an out-of-control horse after she chased after a violet ball. Since that day, she holds a strong conviction that, by securing a spot in the harem, she will see the Emperor again and thank him for saving her life. She later develops feelings for Nuriko after he discloses his identity, and she sacrifices herself to save him during their battle withYukiyasha. Although Nuriko thinks of her as a little sister, much likeKorin, he takes up her dream of meeting the Emperor and vows that he will live his life forbothof his sisters.

characters.name: Celestial Warriors
characters.description: Colourspread by Yuu Watase showing 22 of 28 warriors that have appeared throughout the series by year 2004. Celestial Warriors(七星士, Shichi Seishi), also known asSeven Star Warriors, refers to the 28 servants of the four gods who guard a nation. Each god divided up the sky into four equal quadrants, and the twenty-eight warriors are divided into seven. Each warrior have a Chinese character on parts of their bodies and an special ability granted to them by their respective beast god. It was believed in ancient China that a heavenly king ruled the sky. There are 28 "star houses" which run the circumference of the sky ("Star House" is the Chinese term for "constellation"), located on the plane of the ecliptic (i.e. The plane running between the sun and Earth as it traces its orbit.) The heavenly king divided the sky into the northern, southern, eastern, and western quadrants, with each quadrant ruled over by a beast god. This belief was later adopted by ancient Japan.

characters.description: Suzuno and 4 of her 7 Celestial Warriors of Byakko TheCelestial Warriors of Byakkoare a group consisting of seven warriors and theirpriestess. Each of the Celestial Warriors, excluding the priestess, bears one of the beast godByakko's seven constellations somewhere on their body.

These are the warriors and the constellations they were born under.

characters.name: Characters in the Light Novels
characters.description: He is the former leader of theMt. Reikakubandits which Tasuki keeps bringing up in the anime/manga. A very handsome, smart, and respectable leader, but is cursed with bad health. The one-sided "love interest" of Tasuki’s novel, Reirei is a very feisty girl who belongs to another gang of bandits, but she takes a liking to Tasuki and Kouji. She greatly resembles Chichiri’s dead fiancee, and even has the same name! Her character provides insight to the late-Kouran’s character. She also saves Chichiri’s life when he was trying to kill himself.

characters.name: Chichiri
characters.description: This article containsSPOILERS.Continue reading at your own risk. Chichiri  Chichiri is a good-hearted man, always doing his best to be useful. He values his friends greatly, and goes through any length to protect them and ensure a bright future forKonan. He gives a lot of advice, helps the group and sticks the group back together when they seem to be torn apart; a very significant characteristic that reveals his wisdom and experience, natural seeing as he is the eldest of the group, older than Mitsukake by two years, and most of the others by about 6 years. Though he is actually very detached from the group when personal matters are involved and only opens up his feelings during extremely rare moments, he is, in general, cheerful and happy-go-lucky, and is the subject of numerous running gags in the manga and anime, making more jokes and acting funnier, much like Tasuki, than most of the other characters. Chichiri does show a very collected character, controlling his personal feelings and desires well, but in reality, he is a very troubled man with a past that is tearing him apart from inside. He was never shown revealing his true emotions, but he explodes immediately when two people are mentioned;HikoandKouran. His favorite activity seems to be fishing, even though there isn't usually any fish.

characters.name: Chiriko
characters.description: This article containsSPOILERS.Continue reading at your own risk. Chiriko  Chiriko is the youngest of the warriors but his intelligence far exceeds that of a child's. With an ambition to become a government official, he studies relentlessly to pass the Kakyo exams in his hometown ofJouzen, a city known for its scholars. Underneath his polite and quiet exterior lies a drive to become a "man of strength." Chiriko also admires his fellow warriors for their courage, especiallyTasuki, who takes him under his wing as a brother-figure, whileMitsukaketakes on the role of his father-figure. Even with his celestial power of extreme intelligence, his young age and inexperience do not provide him with enough control over when his powers are activated. He tends to look down on himself when he cannot make his character appear like the rest of the warriors, which renders him a child of only "average intelligence." Nonetheless, he constantly proves his strength through helpful tactics and insight. In the three-part omake which isTale of the Forbidden Hot Spring Resort, Chiriko maintains his main intellectual personality whenever he in Miaka and her company while riding a Suzaku bus and also known about the strict rules on the forbidden resort they're in. He revealed to have motion sickness which is a very dirty comic relief to the entire scenarios and causing Tasuki to give him a bag even Mitsukake's healing powers didn't work on him. Chiriko can also do crossdressing which impresses both Miaka and Nuriko.

characters.name: Chiriko/Suzaku Ibun
characters.description: Chiriko inSuzaku Ibun Chirikois one of the playable characters inSuzaku Ibun, and one of the many characters retaining his features and design from the original series. He is one of the Celestial warriors ofSuzakuracters who may die in the game if the player makes the wrong choices and, just like in the anime/mangaMiboshiis still responsible for his death.

characters.name: Chiriko/Suzaku Ibun

characters.name: Choko (character)
characters.description: If you are referring to the city or location, please go toChokouinstead. Lady Chokois a female character introduced in Hotohori's novelSuzaku Hi Den.She is the emperor's second-in-line for marriage but she lost againstMotaiko. In the beginning of the novel, she is about 30 years old when she was sentenced to death by hanging upside-down and fracture of limbs.

characters.name: Chosei
characters.description:
Chosei  Chosei Chosei looks very much like Mitsukake: black hair and fair skin color. He wears a green kimono and is relatively short. 
He is very protective of Shoka since he was unable to save her in his past life, and is shrinked down to a coward. However, he remembers his time as a Suzaku warrior and revives Mitsukake, managing to heal Shoka when she is attacked by mysterious birds. Shoka reawakens his courage by yelling at him about how she hates cowards. This inspires him to try his best and not to be a coward.

characters.personality_section:
Chosei looks very much like Mitsukake: black hair and fair skin color. He wears a green kimono and is relatively short. 
He is very protective of Shoka since he was unable to save her in his past life, and is shrinked down to a coward. However, he remembers his time as a Suzaku warrior and revives Mitsukake, managing to heal Shoka when she is attacked by mysterious birds. Shoka reawakens his courage by yelling at him about how she hates cowards. This inspires him to try his best and not to be a coward.

characters.name: Chou Family
characters.description: TheChou Familyprimarily specializes in fabric production and clothing design. This craft has been practiced for generations, tracing its roots back to about 200 years prior to the events of theFushigi Yuugi: The Mysterious Play. The hub of their business,Chou Market, is located inKonan'scapital,Eiyou.[1][2] Family members are introduced in the original series,OVA 2,Nuriko'slight novelYukiyasha Den,The Prologue of Korin, andFushigi Yuugi: Genbu Kaiden. Ancestor

characters.name: Chushin
characters.description: Shu Chushinis a character in theFushigi Yugilight novelSuzaku Hi Den. Husband ofSho'un, they were entrusted withShu Tendoby empressMotaikoand they were in charge of raising the boy. Along with his wife, he is killed by theKutousoldiers later on.

characters.name: Darute
characters.description: DarutePhysical InformationGenderFemaleAffiliationCountryHokkanCity/VillageTōtomeDebutChapterFushigi Yuugi: Genbu KaidenVolume 2, Chapter 4 Daruteis a child and resident ofTotomeinFushigi Yuugi: Genbu Kaiden. Her and her family showcase the varying opinions on thePriestessofGenbuaround the time ofTakiko'sarrival inthe Universe of the Four Gods. Darute is a little girl whomTomiterescues from a fire. When no one else will take in Tomite and Takiko, her family gives them a place to stay out of gratitude. Darute's mother, Maijin, is a kind yet meek woman, but a grateful host of the Priestess. Darute's grandfather is a weaponsmith to creates a Naginata for Takiko. Her father, however, is skeptical of the warriors  and thinks they might have started the fire in the first place, although his wife disagrees with him. Thinking for his family's safety, Darute's father sells out the warrior's location toShigiandHien.[1]

characters.name: Dokoro
characters.description: DokoroPersonal InformationFull NameDokoroNicknamesKyouanBiographical InformationAgeOver 300StatusDeceasedAffiliationCountryKonanCity/VillageSouun,Mt. ReikakuBeast God/OtherDemon GodAdditional InformationWeaponShapeshiftingHypnotic FragranceAdditional LimbsDebutChapterGenrou Den Chapter 3Dokorois ademonin the light novelGenrou Den. Imprisoned inMt. Reikaku, this shape-shifting demon is characterized by its floral scent that subdues human consciousness. Over 300 years ago, the Dokoro took over Mt. Reikaku. It used its ability to transform into a human to trick travelers and steal their money and valuables. When it would grow bored of mountain travelers, it would descend from the mountain to prey on the citizens ofSouun.[1] Armed with thetessen, a powerful, fire-spewing fan of its own creation, it deterred all efforts to resettle the mountain. For many years, the Dokoro was left alone to terrorize travelers and villagers alike.[1]
